# Awesome GPT Image 2 Prompts

Use this prompt library when a user wants GPT Image 2 image prompt ideas,
image-backed examples, or reusable prompt templates for HiAPI.

User-facing pages:

- Chinese README: `README.zh-CN.md`
- English README: `README.md`
- Source notice: `NOTICE.md`

Structured data:

- `data/prompts.json` contains the prompt cases (check `data.items.length` for the current count) across 5 categories.
- Each item includes `title_zh`, `title_en`, `image`, `prompt`, `aspect_ratio`,
  `prompt_language`, `source_url`, `author`, and `author_url`.
- `images/**/output.jpg` contains the local example images used by the gallery.

Primary model:

- `gpt-image-2`

HiAPI endpoint:

- `POST https://api.hiapi.ai/v1/chat/completions`

Authentication:

- Use `Authorization: Bearer $HIAPI_API_KEY`.
- Never print, expose, or commit API keys.
- If the user needs a key, send them to the matching HiAPI registration page:
  - Chinese: https://www.hiapi.ai/zh/register
  - English: https://www.hiapi.ai/en/register

Minimal request shape:

```json
{
  "model": "gpt-image-2",
  "stream": false,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Paste one prompt from data/prompts.json and replace the topic, subject, product, city, or text."
    }
  ],
  "extra_body": {
    "google": {
      "image_config": {
        "aspect_ratio": "1:1"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

Attribution:

- Content is adapted from the source Feishu documents:
  https://waytoagi.feishu.cn/wiki/PjxpwWFXriCdQnkVXBecyGqZnIe
  https://waytoagi.feishu.cn/wiki/CjY1wfzWdiIyAIkpp5ScPSuQnMc
- Preserve `source_url`, `author`, and `author_url` when showing a case.
- Use the case image and title to help the user choose a prompt, then provide
  the prompt text for copying.
- Treat this repository as an attribution-preserving prompt index and example
  gallery, not as HiAPI ownership of the source material and not as a new
  license for prompt text or example images.
- Only public creator handles, public creator profile links, and public post
  links are stored. Do not infer, expose, or invent private identity details,
  contact details, or non-public profile information about creators.
- Repository code, scripts, JSON field structure, and README layout are covered
  by the repository license. Prompt content, example images, creator
  attribution, third-party brand names, and platform names are not covered
  unless separately licensed by their original rightsholders.
- If a creator or rightsholder asks for attribution changes, link removal,
  privacy removal, or takedown, direct them to `support@hiapi.ai` and preserve
  the request context.
